mailingAddress.street: Hill of Tara, Royal Seat of the High Kings

roles.name: Druid Loremaster
roles.description: Keeper of the deep lore — designs the great solution and divines its shape from the ogham staves.

roles.name: Rí of the Hosting
roles.description: King of the war-band — calls the muster, holds the timeline, and answers to the High King.

roles.name: Brehon Scribe
roles.description: Steward of the Brehon Laws — keeps records, layouts, and the right of every tribe.

roles.name: Goibniu the Smith
roles.description: Forges Apex and LWC at the divine smithy — the weapons of the platform.

roles.name: Ard-Druid of the West
roles.description: High Druid over all Salesforce craft — sets the geasa and guides the senior smiths.

roles.name: Senior Bard of the Court
roles.description: Practiced bard who walks the borderlands of requirements and song with skill.

roles.name: Apprentice Bard
roles.description: Learns the meters and the ogham — carries discovery and configuration under the Senior Bard's eye.

roles.name: Master Bridge-Builder of the Boyne
roles.description: Architect of the great spans across rivers — designs all integrations between Salesforce and the otherworld.

roles.name: Senior Causeway Engineer
roles.description: Lays the standing stones of API, middleware, and event flows under the Master Bridge-Builder's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Causeway Engineer
roles.description: Learns the craft of crossings — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the patient patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of the Tuath
roles.description: Tends the wounded and weary like Dian Cécht at the Well of Sláine — finds the maladies before the king sees them.

roles.name: High Filidh of Renown
roles.description: Master poet of the court — leads all marketing craft and lifts the praise-songs of the tribe.

roles.name: Senior Filidh
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — composes the great satires and eulogies that shape opinion.

roles.name: Court Filidh
roles.description: Carries the campaign through the rath and the dún — content, creative, and the daily verse.

roles.name: Council Ollamh of Tara
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is sworn — translates between the chieftains and the druidic craft of design.

roles.name: Master Smith of Falias
roles.description: Senior forger of the four treasures — leads the most complex Apex and platform builds.

roles.name: Novice Bard of Eire
roles.description: First-year apprentice at the bardic school — learning the modes and the cadence of the platform.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Tuatha Dé Danann — Four Treasures Platform

workstreams.name: Migrate the Lore of the Tuath

realms.projectName: Fomorians — Tower of Conand Surveillance Build
Ulster Cycle — Cattle Raid Logistics Platform

workstreams.name: Discovery & Muster of the Red Branch

realms.projectName: Fenian Cycle & Otherworld — Salmon of Knowledge Analytics
realms.subAccountName: Fianna of Almu & the Aos Sí

children.name: Lay Recording at Tír na nÓg

tuatha-de-danann.name: Arrival in the Dark Cloud
tuatha-de-danann.description: Discovery sign-off — the Tuath descend on Eire in the great mist.

tuatha-de-danann.name: Forging of the Four Treasures
tuatha-de-danann.description: Build kickoff: stone, spear, sword, and cauldron taken from the four cities.

tuatha-de-danann.name: First Battle of Mag Tuired
tuatha-de-danann.description: Mid-project gate: war against the Fir Bolg, Nuada loses his hand.

tuatha-de-danann.name: Silver Hand of Nuada
tuatha-de-danann.description: Phase invoice trigger: Dian Cécht crafts the silver replacement.

tuatha-de-danann.name: Lugh Joins the Hall
tuatha-de-danann.description: All-skilled Samildánach takes his place at the council.

tuatha-de-danann.name: Second Battle of Mag Tuired
tuatha-de-danann.description: Go-Live: the Tuath defeat the Fomorians; Lugh slays Balor.

tuatha-de-danann.name: Hand-off to the Sons of Míl
tuatha-de-danann.description: Hyper-care close: Tuath retreat into the sídhe mounds.

fomorians-enemies.name: Levy of Tribute
fomorians-enemies.description: Discovery: tribute roll established across the four provinces.

fomorians-enemies.name: Reign of Bres Begins
fomorians-enemies.description: Build phase: half-Fomorian Bres takes the high kingship.

fomorians-enemies.name: Satire of Cairbre
fomorians-enemies.description: Mid-project gate: Bres's stinginess provokes the first satire ever spoken in Eire.

fomorians-enemies.name: Muster at Tory Island
fomorians-enemies.description: Sea-host gathered under Balor's banner for the great battle.

fomorians-enemies.name: Balor's Eye Opened
fomorians-enemies.description: Go-Live: surveillance plane fully operational at Mag Tuired.

fomorians-enemies.name: Eye Slain by Tathlum
fomorians-enemies.description: Project close: Lugh's sling-stone shuts the Evil Eye forever.

fomorians-enemies.name: Final Reckoning at the Sea
fomorians-enemies.description: Final invoice: Fomorians driven beneath the waves.

ulster-cycle-heroes.name: Pillow Talk at Cruachan
ulster-cycle-heroes.description: Project kickoff: Medb and Ailill compare wealth, the Cattle Raid is conceived.

ulster-cycle-heroes.name: Muster of the Connacht Host
ulster-cycle-heroes.description: Build phase: the great army marches east toward Cooley.

ulster-cycle-heroes.name: Pangs of the Ulstermen
ulster-cycle-heroes.description: Mid-project gate: Macha's curse leaves only Cú Chulainn standing.

ulster-cycle-heroes.name: Ford-Fight with Ferdiad
ulster-cycle-heroes.description: UAT phase: three days of single combat at Áth Fhirdiad.

ulster-cycle-heroes.name: Charge of the Red Branch
ulster-cycle-heroes.description: Go-Live: the Ulstermen rouse and break the Connacht host.

ulster-cycle-heroes.name: Death of the Brown Bull
ulster-cycle-heroes.description: Hyper-care close: Donn Cuailnge slays Finnbennach and dies of grief.

ulster-cycle-heroes.name: Settlement at Emain Macha
ulster-cycle-heroes.description: Final invoice: cattle accounted, honour-prices paid.

fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.name: Council at the Hill of Almu
fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.description: Kickoff council in Fionn's hall on the white hill of Leinster.

fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.name: Salmon of Knowledge Caught
fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.description: Discovery: the Salmon caught in the Pool of Fec, wisdom transferred to the thumb.

fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.name: Pursuit of Diarmuid and Gráinne
fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.description: Build: dolmens raised across Eire as the lovers flee the Fianna.

fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.name: Battle of Gabhra
fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.description: UAT acceptance: the Fianna fall at the great battle, only a handful walk away.

fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.name: Oisín Returns from Tír na nÓg
fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.description: Go-Live + handoff: three hundred years pass in a day, Oisín touches Eire and ages to dust.

fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.name: Lays of the Fianna Recorded
fenian-cycle-and-otherworld.description: Final invoice: Saint Patrick records the Acallam na Senórach from Caoilte and Oisín.

The Dagda.notes: Stirring the Cauldron of Plenty — quarterly feast preparation.

Lugh Lámhfhada.notes: Lughnasadh games at Tailtiu — must preside personally.

Brigid.notes: Imbolc fires lit at Kildare — annual obligation.

Nuada Airgetlám.notes: Silver hand re-fitted by Dian Cécht — annual maintenance.

The Morrigan.notes: Washing armour at the ford — battlefield omen duty.

Balor of the Evil Eye.notes: Eyelid hoist serviced — four men required to lift.

Bres.notes: Tribute audit at Tory — checking the rents from Eire.

Cú Chulainn.notes: Cooling-down vats at Emain Macha — post-ríastrad recovery.

Conchobar mac Nessa.notes: Royal court of arbitration at Emain Macha — Brehon hearings.

Medb.notes: Inventory of the white-horned bull Finnbennach.

Deirdre.notes: Mourning week — Sons of Uisneach memorial.

Fionn mac Cumhaill.notes: Hunting at Slievenamon — Fianna initiation trials.

Oisín.notes: Riding to Tír na nÓg with Niamh — extended otherworld leave.

Diarmuid Ua Duibhne.notes: Avoiding wild boars on Ben Bulben — geis-mandated rest.

Niamh of Tír na nÓg.notes: White horse re-shod at the otherworld smithy.
